title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Dell India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Dell India
jsonLd.description:
Dell India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Dell India:
Dell India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India!
